programme.desc: Two writers mistake a series of tit-for-tat murders, confusing one's ex-wife for the other's beastly mother.

programme.title: The Golden Child (1986)
programme.desc: A professional child-finder (Eddie Murphy) is recruited to rescue a mystical Tibetan boy from a shape-shifting villain (Charles Dance).

programme.title: Dirty Rotten Scoundrels (1988)
programme.desc: An American con man (Steve Martin) and his British rival (Michael Caine) target a soap heiress (Glenne Headly) from Cleveland on the French Riviera.

programme.title: A Fish Called Wanda (1988)
programme.desc: An American (Jamie Lee Curtis) flirts with a crook, a barrister (John Cleese) and a mercenary (Kevin Kline) to find diamonds in London.

programme.title: Soapdish (1991)
programme.desc: The star (Sally Field) of a soap opera is rattled by her ex-lover's (Kevin Kline) return to the daytime drama The Sun Also Sets.

programme.title: Throw Momma From the Train (1987)
programme.desc: Two writers mistake a series of tit-for-tat murders, confusing one's ex-wife for the other's beastly mother.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in the West (1968)
programme.sub-title: Once Upon a Time in the West (1968)
programme.desc: An outlaw (Henry Fonda) working for a railroad magnate fights a stranger (Charles Bronson) for a New Orleans widow's (Claudia Cardinale) land.

programme.title: Something Wild (1986)
programme.desc: A wild woman (Melanie Griffith) takes a yuppie (Jeff Daniels) to her high-school reunion, attended by her ex-convict husband (Ray Liotta).

programme.title: What's the Worst That Could Happen? (2001)
programme.sub-title: What's the Worst That Could Happen? (2001)
programme.desc: When a professional thief robs a beachfront mansion, he catches the owner in a compromising situation.

programme.title: The Golden Child (1986)
programme.desc: A professional child-finder (Eddie Murphy) is recruited to rescue a mystical Tibetan boy from a shape-shifting villain (Charles Dance).

programme.title: Dirty Rotten Scoundrels (1988)
programme.desc: An American con man (Steve Martin) and his British rival (Michael Caine) target a soap heiress (Glenne Headly) from Cleveland on the French Riviera.

programme.title: A Fish Called Wanda (1988)
programme.desc: An American (Jamie Lee Curtis) flirts with a crook, a barrister (John Cleese) and a mercenary (Kevin Kline) to find diamonds in London.

programme.title: Gang Related (1997)
programme.desc: Two corrupt homicide cops selling narcotics accidentally kill an undercover DEA agent and try to pin the murder on a homeless alcoholic, but the dead man's partner comes calling.

programme.title: Mulholland Falls (1996)
programme.desc: An ex-lover's murder creates problems for the married head (Nick Nolte) of an elite police unit in early '50s Los Angeles.

programme.title: From
programme.sub-title: The Heart Is a Lonely Hunter
programme.desc: Boyd and Jade find themselves at odds over whether they can trust the knowledge in Jade's head; deeply troubling news from the settlement makes its way back to town.

programme.title: The Martian (2015)
programme.desc: Left behind by his crew, a stranded astronaut must find a way to survive on Mars, while NASA and a team of international scientists work tirelessly to bring him home.

programme.title: Gladiator II (2024)
programme.desc: Lucius must enter the Colosseum after the powerful emperors of Rome conquer his home. With rage in his heart and the future of the empire at stake, he looks to the past to find the strength and honor needed to return the glory of Rome to its people.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven (2016)
programme.desc: Desperate townspeople hire seven mercenaries (Denzel Washington, Chris Pratt, Ethan Hawke) to battle a greedy industrialist (Peter Sarsgaard) and his ruthless henchmen in the Old West.

programme.title: A Fistful of Dollars (1964)
programme.desc: Wandering gunfighter Joe arrives in the Mexican village of San Miguel in the midst of a power struggle among sheriff John Baxter and the three Rojo brothers. He is hired by Esteban Rojo to join their gang, but he plays one side against the other.

programme.title: Missing in Action 2: The Beginning (1985)
programme.desc: An imprisoned U.S. colonel (Chuck Norris) fights the military overlord (Oh Soon-tek) of a slave-labor opium operation in Vietnam.

programme.title: Blame It on Rio (1983)
programme.desc: A middle-aged coffee broker (Michael Caine) eyes his partner's (Joseph Bologna) nubile teenage daughter (Michelle Johnson) on vacation in Brazil.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven (1960)
programme.desc: A man in black (Yul Brynner) recruits six hired guns to lead Mexican villagers against the gang of an outlaw (Eli Wallach).

programme.title: Cyborg (1989)
programme.desc: A martial artist (Jean-Claude Van Damme) hunts a killer (Vincent Klyn) in a plague-infested urban dump of the future.

programme.title: A House on the Bayou (2021)
programme.desc: Hoping for an idyllic getaway, a couple and their daughter visit a remote mansion in rural Louisiana. When suspiciously friendly neighbors show up uninvited, the weekend soon takes a sinister turn as dark secrets test the family's fragile bond.

programme.title: Capote (2005)
programme.desc: Writer Truman Capote (Philip Seymour Hoffman) researches the brutal murder of a Kansas family to pen the book "In Cold Blood."

programme.title: September 5 (2024)
programme.desc: During the 1972 Munich Olympics, an American sports broadcasting crew finds itself thrust into covering the hostage crisis involving Israeli athletes.

programme.title: Raging Bull (1980)
programme.desc: The violent nature of prizefighter Jake LaMotta leads first to a boxing championship, then to a downward spiral of self-destruction.

programme.title: Wonder (2017)
programme.desc: Born with facial differences that, up until now, have prevented him from going to a mainstream school, Auggie Pullman becomes the most unlikely of heroes when he enters the local fifth grade.

programme.title: The Curious Case of Benjamin Button (2008)
programme.sub-title: The Curious Case of Benjamin Button (2008)
programme.desc: Benjamin Button (Brad Pitt) is born an old man in 1918 New Orleans and ages in reverse and, in so doing, becomes intimately familiar with the natures of love and death.

programme.title: The Fire Inside (2024)
programme.desc: The story of Claressa "T-Rex" Shields, a boxer from Flint, Mich., who trained to become the first woman in her country's history to win an Olympic gold medal in the sport.

programme.title: The Rage: Carrie 2 (1999)
programme.desc: After her best friend commits suicide, an unpopular girl discovers she has telekinetic powers and uses them to seek revenge on her humiliators.

programme.title: From
programme.sub-title: The Heart Is a Lonely Hunter
programme.desc: Boyd and Jade find themselves at odds over whether they can trust the knowledge in Jade's head; deeply troubling news from the settlement makes its way back to town.

programme.title: Poltergeist III (1988)
programme.desc: Destructive demons follow a little girl (Heather O'Rourke) sent to live with her aunt (Nancy Allen) and uncle (Tom Skerritt) in a Chicago high-rise.

programme.title: Summer Days, Summer Nights (2018)
programme.desc: On the south shore of Long Island in the summer of 1983, a group of working-class teenagers and 20-somethings work their summer jobs, fall in and out of love, and wrestle with what the future holds when the summer ends and the real world beckons.

programme.title: The Fortune Cookie (1966)
programme.desc: A TV cameraman hurt while covering a football game is told by his brother-in-law how to get a big insurance settlement.

programme.title: Saint Maud (2019)
programme.desc: Maud, an unstable, newly devout hospice nurse, becomes obsessed with saving her dying patient's soul -- but sinister forces and her own sinful past threaten her holy calling.

programme.title: The Visitor (2022)
programme.desc: When Robert and his wife move to her childhood home, he discovers an old portrait in the attic of a man who looks just like him. He soon travels down a frightening rabbit hole as he tries to discover the true identity of his mysterious doppelgänger.

programme.title: Preparation for the Next Life (2025)
programme.desc: A Uyghur woman moves to New York where she labors in Chinatown's underground kitchens. As she falls in love with a young soldier, they discover the possibility of a better life together than the ones they believed they were destined to live alone.

programme.title: Lenny (1974)
programme.desc: 1950s comic Lenny Bruce (Dustin Hoffman) spurs controversy with his drug use, graphic language and marriage to a stripper (Valerie Perrine).

programme.title: Nickel Boys (2024)
programme.desc: Elwood Curtis' college dreams are shattered when he's sentenced to a brutal reformatory in the Jim Crow South. Clinging to his optimistic worldview, Elwood strikes up a friendship with a fellow Black teen who dispenses fundamental tips for survival.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity (2007)
programme.desc: A young couple (Katie Featherston, Micah Sloat) move into their first new home but are disturbed by what appears to be a supernatural presence that is most active at night.

programme.title: Shell (2024)
programme.desc: Desperate to reclaim her career, once-beloved actress Samantha Lake gets drawn into the glamorous world of wellness mogul Zoe Shannon, only to uncover a monstrous truth beneath the seemingly flawless surface.

programme.title: Scary Movie 4 (2006)
programme.desc: Dim-witted Cindy Campbell (Anna Faris) and her sex-crazed friend, Brenda (Regina Hall), team up with cute-but-clueless Tom Ryan (Craig Bierko) to save the world from a hostile alien invasion.

programme.title: Scary Movie V (2013)
programme.desc: Bizarre activity follows after a husband and wife bring their newborn baby home from the hospital. Realizing that a demon is stalking their family, they consult paranormal experts and install numerous cameras to drive the spirit out.

programme.title: The Autopsy of Jane Doe (2016)
programme.desc: When father and son coroners investigate the death of a beautiful "Jane Doe," they find increasingly bizarre clues.

programme.title: The Ledge (2011)
programme.desc: After an atheistic neighbor (Charlie Hunnam) has an affair with his wife, a vengeful Fundamentalist forces the man to choose between killing himself or allowing someone else to die in his place.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity 3 (2011)
programme.desc: A videographer becomes obsessed with finding the source of disturbing late-night noises in his home and discovers its terrifying origin.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity: The Ghost Dimension (2015)
programme.desc: An old and mysterious camcorder leads to the discovery of a supernatural terror in a family's new home.

programme.title: The Girl in the Pool (2024)
programme.desc: A man's life collapses when his mistress is found dead in his pool. Terrified of the consequences and desperate to protect his family, he conceals the truth, triggering a chaotic night that threatens to unravel his perfect life.

programme.title: Slingshot (2024)
programme.desc: An astronaut struggles to maintain his grip on reality during a possibly compromised mission to Saturn's moon, Titan.

programme.title: The Night Clerk (2020)
programme.desc: A hotel clerk becomes the prime suspect when a woman is murdered during his shift. As the police investigation closes in, he makes a personal connection with a guest -- but soon realizes he must stop the killer before she becomes the next victim.

programme.title: Light of My Life (2019)
programme.desc: A man tries to protect his daughter from the dangers of the world after a devastating plague wipes out most of the female population.

programme.title: Gasoline Alley (2022)
programme.desc: Set in the underbelly of Los Angeles, a man is drawn into a high-profile triple murder. The two police detectives on his tail soon join him in attempting to uncover an explosive conspiracy.

programme.title: Most Wanted (2020)
programme.desc: An investigative reporter fights to expose the twisted truth behind a heroin bust orchestrated by dirty cops to frame an innocent man -- sentencing him to life in a Thai prison.

programme.title: Grudge Match (2013)
programme.desc: A boxing promoter (Kevin Hart) offers two rival boxers (Robert De Niro, Sylvester Stallone) the chance to come out of retirement for one final bout.

programme.title: Last Vegas (2013)
programme.desc: Aging friends (Michael Douglas, Robert De Niro, Morgan Freeman) head to Las Vegas to celebrate the end of one's long bachelorhood and relive their glory days.

programme.title: Without a Paddle (2004)
programme.desc: Three childhood friends (Seth Green, Matthew Lillard, Dax Shepard) embark on a canoe trip to find a plane hijacker's stash of money.

programme.title: Without a Paddle: Nature's Calling (2009)
programme.desc: Two friends (Oliver James, Kristopher Turner) and a crazy Briton (Rik Young) have wild misadventures while searching for a missing girl in the woods.

programme.title: Anything for Fame
programme.desc: Venturing into the virtual Wild West to profile a new breed of content creator.

programme.title: Erotic Alien Encounter (2024)
programme.desc: A humanoid alien named David gets stranded on Earth and is befriended by a beautiful nurse named Kate. With help from her best friend, Kate is determined to help David return to his home planet before government agents get to him first.

programme.title: Get Rich or Die Tryin' (2005)
programme.desc: When his world spirals out of control, a drug dealer wants to leave his violent life behind and pursue his dream of becoming a rap artist. He channels the same manic intensity to his writing as he does to dealing.

programme.title: Undisputed (2002)
programme.desc: An undefeated world-champion prizefighter, who is convicted of rape and sent to prison, must confront and fight the reigning prison boxing champion.

programme.title: The Outlaws (2024)
programme.desc: A group of outlaws awaken to their empty train heist bag. Interrogations begin as each cowboy becomes the focus in an attempt to unmask the thief among them. Tensions mount as each bandit struggles to clear their name before bullets fly.

programme.title: Small Soldiers (1998)
programme.desc: A boy (Gregory Smith) and his neighborhood crush (Kirsten Dunst) become involved in a war when a faulty microchip turns toy soldiers into a tiny but lethal army.

programme.title: Dreamland (2019)
programme.desc: A teen bounty hunter is torn between helping or capturing a seductive fugitive bank robber hiding in his small town during the Great Depression.

programme.title: Face/Off (1997)
programme.desc: An FBI agent (John Travolta) and his nemesis (Nicolas Cage) trade physical identities.

programme.title: The Godfather (1972)
programme.desc: Crime boss Vito Corleone and his sons, the ruthless yet loyal members of the Corleone family, rule their secretive New York empire with an iron fist.

programme.title: Breach (2020)
programme.desc: Fleeing a devastating plague on Earth, an interstellar ark comes under attack from a new threat -- a shape-shifting alien force intent on slaughtering what's left of humanity.

programme.title: Winter Spring Summer or Fall (2024)
programme.desc: Young Remi has her future figured out, until she meets Barnes, who lives for the moment and makes her question everything. As their love story unfolds, she faces a choice -- stick to her plan or risk it all for a life she never saw coming.

programme.title: Election (1999)
programme.desc: Tracy faces no competition in her high school election, but the civics teacher intervenes by encouraging the varsity football player to run for president, resulting in chaos.

programme.title: 4:44 Last Day on Earth (2011)
programme.desc: Two lovers (Willem Dafoe, Shanyn Leigh) immerse themselves in sex, art and other activities after word breaks that the world will end by the next morning.

programme.title: Don't Knock Twice (2016)
programme.desc: A mother looking to reconnect with her estranged daughter attracts the attention of a demonic witch.

programme.title: Backcountry (2014)
programme.desc: A couple (Missy Peregrym, Jeff Roop) on a deep-wilderness hike become hopelessly lost within an aggressive black bear's territory.
